message:
feat(render): add DiffSkipHint for certificate-based diff elision

Introduce DiffSkipHint enum enabling the render pipeline to skip or
narrow diff computation when certificates guarantee buffer identity:

- FullDiff: perform standard diff computation (default path)
- SkipDiff: skip diff entirely when buffers are guaranteed identical
- NarrowToRows(Vec<u16>): restrict diff to specified dirty rows only

Includes skips_work() and label() introspection methods, plus 7 unit
tests validating all variants, edge cases, and certificate semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
